goal: Update install.sh to remove STATE.md and auto-init memory, then migrate pause/resume/status/sync commands to use memory exclusively.

tasks.name: Update install.sh — remove STATE.md, add auto-delete, auto-init memory
tasks.action: Remove STATE.md from template loop, add migration auto-delete for existing STATE.md, add memory auto-init after installation.

tasks.name: Migrate pause.md + resume.md to use memory metadata for handoff
tasks.action: Replace STATE.md handoff read/write with memory metadata on active epic. Remove all STATE.md references.

tasks.name: Migrate status.md + sync.md — drop STATE.md, use memory only
tasks.action: Replace STATE.md reads with memory prime()/stats(). Remove sync Modes 1-4 entirely. Make Mode 7 the primary sync mechanism.

commitMessage: feat(kill-state-md): migrate install + session commands off STATE.md
